threshold_summary: Coverage=1.0 & pre≥120s & post≥60s →100; coverage=1.0 & pre≥60s →88; coverage=1.0 & pre<60s →72; coverage<1.0 →0+gate.

completed_normally & 0 shutdowns & battery ok →100; shutdown≥1 →20 (BASE_SESSION_INTERRUPTED); Operation Log absent/null → unconfirmed (≈60), never silent pass; download not confirmed → advisory flag.
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q3: session_interrupted band stays critical for v2.1 (safe default). v2 enhancement to check timestamp overlap with flight window pending — when implemented, will conditionally downgrade to material if shutdown is outside flight window.

threshold_summary: version supported & header complete & dual-freq →100; single-freq →70; version unsupported →35 (BASE_RINEX_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED); header incomplete →40.
no gaps & low slips →100; minor gaps →75; any_gap_gt_60s →40; feeds disturbance_signature composite.

gate_action: Sets base_station_score = 0 (HARD GATE — Q1 lock v2.1). FLAG: ANTENNA_HEIGHT_MISSING.
threshold_summary: vertical + reference=ARP + ≥3 measurements + RINEX agreement →100; single vertical →88; slant →72; height entered but conflicts with RINEX delta-H →55 (review); no height →0+gate.
over known mark & verified by 2nd person →100; known mark only →80; unverified reused mark →50 (BASE_BENCHMARK_UNVERIFIED, non-scoring warn + LE handoff).
form model matches RINEX type →100; mismatch →40 (type inconsistent; NOT a true ANTEX calibration check — that is Stage 2).
low C/N0 variance →100; moderate →65; high variance →35 (BASE_MULTIPATH_RISK). Risk proxy, not error magnitude.
Kp low OR dual-freq →100; Kp high & single-freq →40 (BASE_IONO_RISK). External NOAA SWPC dependency; not yet built.
mean PDOP <2 →100; 2–4 →80; 4–6 →55; >6 →30. General geometry hygiene; no enumerated problem.
